text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen, a fierce contest to
end the year. And there, standing in her way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Are T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto. The ultimate
duo that has seized first and second place in
countless senior G1 races. They are quite literally
the best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the race approaches, the venue stirs with
tangible excitement...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's different from my friend in every way. I can't
see it... The shape of her soul...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Nope, I'm simply not feeling it. I'm not
getting any sense that our performances would
mesh.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She's far too bizarre to be my costar. Operetta
and horror are fundamentally different, you see.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, let's just try and get along...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no signs of a rivalry sparking between the
two. It feels more like a contest between entirely
different genres...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You must not obstruct the adrenaline! Listen, you have to let it flow through you! Flow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe gives a slight nod to Agnes
Tachyon's encouragement. I head over to her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We're... Our path... is to reach my friend, no
matter what...
choice_data_list: Right, and now's the time to do it!
Right, and now's the time to do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She got so close to her at the Kikuka Sho. Which
means this time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe is even stronger today. She can
do it. She can reach her friend and realize the
dream she's harbored since childhood.
